UG-51  STAYED SURFACES. (a) Flat plates that require staying shall be designed in accordance with the rules of this paragraph. The maximum allowable stress shall be as specified in UG-23. (b) Stay bolts and stays shall be proportioned so that the stress does not exceed the allowable values. The pitch of stays shall be calculated using the design pressure established in UG-22. (c) The minimum plate thickness between stays shall not be less than that required by UG-27 for an equivalent unstayed plate. See also UG-34 for flat head design methods. Stayed surface construction shall comply with UW-19 for welded attachments. For inspection, refer to UG-93.
